title: The Shimmering Mirage
lines: The sand beneath your feet is no longer orange; it has turned to a fine, white powder that feels like ground glass.
Floating just inches above the shimmering horizon is a fortress of impossible beauty—a palace built from moonlight and prisms. Its towers spiral toward the twilight clouds like frozen lightning.
It looks fragile enough to shatter with a single breath, yet as solid as the mountain you left behind.

options.desc: 1. Approach the shimmering gates of the moon-glass palace
2. Stare into the geometric patterns of the walls
3. Resist the mirage and head back toward the dunes
